obsidian-second-brain.setup: Live: install the Obsidian 'Local REST API' plugin, then `claude mcp add --transport http --scope user obsidian https://127.0.0.1:27124/mcp/ -H "Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>"`. File-based fallback: set OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH in .env.

capture.setup: No API key. Ingests articles/YouTube/PDF into the Obsidian second brain (MCP or OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH).

task-manager.setup: No API key. Manages tasks/projects in the Obsidian vault (MCP or OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH).

web-research.setup: No setup. Uses Claude's built-in web search/fetch; can save cited notes to the Obsidian vault when available.

email-assistant.setup: Drafting needs nothing. Reading/sending needs a connected, authenticated email MCP (e.g. the claude.ai Gmail connector) — check `claude mcp list`.

calendar.setup: Planning needs nothing. Live read/write needs a connected, authenticated calendar MCP (e.g. a Google Calendar connector) — check `claude mcp list`.

local-falcon-seo.setup: Requires the Local Falcon MCP connector in Claude Code (`claude mcp list`). Saves summaries to the Obsidian vault when available.

client-reporting.setup: Uses the Local Falcon (and optionally Canva) connectors plus the Obsidian vault; degrades to a text report if a connector is missing.

lead-prospecting.setup: Requires the Apollo connector; optionally writes to Airtable and the vault. Never auto-sends outreach.

finance-snapshot.setup: Requires the QuickBooks (Intuit) connector. Read-only; can log a snapshot to the vault.
